title: Smoky Keto Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry recipe made with smoky bacon and crunchy vegetables, perfect for a keto diet.

ingredients.name: Bacon
ingredients.notes: Smoky bacon for that extra flavor

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with salt and pepper as needed

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of garlic flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook bacon slices until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add crunchy vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return cooked bacon to the skillet and stir in garlic powder.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
